texto: There is nothing better for us to do than to take ourselves as we find ourselves and make the best of ourselves. If I find myself, as I did, the daughter of an artist who has left me with broadmindedness and a conveniently strong character to resist temptation, I take myself from there and accomplish what I can… I do not even deserve praise for doing my best, for that is my duty and I deserve to be blamed for not doing my best.
explicacao: Citação de Wanda Gág sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is nothing better for us to do than to take ourselves as we find ourselves and make the bes…” articula reflexao, self-improvement, ourselves em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
